symptoms: Agitator works fine at the start, slows down and stops after 30 minutes.
Faint sparking visible through the motor vent slots.
Resets and does the same thing again.

tests.error-log: AGITATOR FAULT trips logged every 30–40 minutes since Tuesday.
tests.inspect-beater: Drive motor brushes are worn down to stubs, making intermittent contact and arcing.
tests.continuity-test: Motor windings healthy. Carbon brushes measured at 2 mm — well below the 8 mm minimum.

flavour: The sparks were complimentary. The diagnosis was not.
authenticityNote: Brushed DC agitator motors in older slushie units fail progressively as brushes wear — they arc and drop out intermittently rather than failing all at once, which makes them an intermittent-fault trap.
